description: Roadmap of frontend tasks for Stage 4 (Learning Core) and daily practice features, including lessons content viewer, interactive grammar exercises, vocabulary lookup library, spaced repetition flashcard drills, AI live tutor workspace, and layout routing integrations.

phases.name: Core Learning & Practice Module Implementation
phases.description: Develop the primary learning engines, dictionary viewers, review drills, and AI tutoring panels using the provided design mockups in stitch_assets.

modules.name: Personalized Lesson Viewer
modules.description: Build layout structures and widgets for rendering generated theory blocks, TTS media assets, and processing multi-step exercises with immediate correction reports.

tasks.title: Implement Lesson View Layout and Theory block
tasks.description: Create route `/lessons/[lesson_id]/page.tsx` and render the lesson theory page. Parse the lesson content JSON (theory, grammar explanations, usage examples, reading texts) and display it beautifully. Use the HTML structure and styles from `front/stitch_assets/lesson_theory_present_perfect.html` to match the exact design.
acceptance_criteria: Accessing `/lessons/{id}` loads the lesson page layout correctly
The theory section, explanation blocks, usage examples, and reading text display according to `lesson_theory_present_perfect.html` design
Integrate standard navigation controls (e.g. Next/Back) to navigate blocks

tasks.title: Implement Interactive Lesson Exercises
tasks.description: Build interactive multiple-choice and fill-in-the-gap exercise step-by-step components. Use the design and HTML templates from `front/stitch_assets/grammar_exercise_present_perfect.html`. Incorporate smooth framer-motion transition between steps and render detailed `<ErrorCorrectionAlert />` block on incorrect answers.
acceptance_criteria: Exercise answering form shows questions and choices from the lesson JSON payload
Framer-motion slide transitions are implemented when switching between exercises
Wrong answers show immediate inline error correction feedback card with clear explanations

tasks.title: Integrate Lesson Complete scoring and XP collection
tasks.description: Hook up the final lesson submission to the API endpoint `POST /api/lessons/{lesson_id}/complete`. Render a lesson completion summary modal showing XP gained, correctness accuracy, and trigger progression animations updating the global header's XP.
acceptance_criteria: Successfully submits completed lesson details to the backend API
Summary view shows total correct/incorrect counts, accuracy, and XP awarded
XP counters in the app header and footer progress bars update dynamically upon completion

modules.name: Vocabulary Library & Audio player
modules.description: Develop vocabulary dictionary interfaces supporting CEFR filters, text searching, and Piper TTS pronunciation playback controls.

tasks.title: Implement Vocabulary Library Search & Filters
tasks.description: Create route `/vocabulary/page.tsx`. Integrate with `GET /api/vocabulary` and `GET /api/vocabulary/user` to list the user's vocabulary words. Create search bars and filter selectors for CEFR levels (A1 to C2) based on the visual design in `front/stitch_assets/vocabulary_list.html`.
acceptance_criteria: Vocabulary page lists all words in a responsive list/grid matching the mockup
Users can filter words by difficulty level pills (A1-C2) and search via input text
Integrate pagination or infinite scroll for larger dictionaries

tasks.title: Integrate TTS Pronunciation Audio playback
tasks.description: Implement Piper TTS playback for vocabulary words. When clicking the volume/pronunciation button on a vocabulary word card, load and play the audio url. Ensure multiple play triggers do not overlap by locking controls during active audio playback.
acceptance_criteria: Volume icon plays word audio returned from the API
Active audio blocks concurrent requests or safely stops previous playback to avoid audio overlap

modules.name: Spaced Repetition Flashcards
modules.description: Build spacing review queue, card flipping visuals, swiping gestures, and gamified progress milestones.

tasks.title: Implement Spaced Repetition Review Flashcard interface
tasks.description: Create route `/review/page.tsx` for spaced repetition review sessions. Use the design and layouts from `front/stitch_assets/review_session.html`. Render review cards with swipe animations (`framer-motion`), flip actions to reveal translations/explanations, and keyboard shortcuts (1-5/space).
acceptance_criteria: Review screen fetches active queue using `GET /api/review/queue` and displays them as flashcards
Cards show front side (studied word/phrase) and flip to back side (translation, examples) upon click
Action buttons submit quality rating scores (0-5) to `POST /api/review/{item_id}/respond` and advance the queue

tasks.title: Implement Review Success Summary and Flashcard Badge popup
tasks.description: Build review queue completion / summary screens showing review statistics. Render the vocabulary flashcard mastery celebration popup when a user unlocks a milestone or clears their queue, using the design from `front/stitch_assets/vocabulary_flashcard_achievement.html`.
acceptance_criteria: Exhausting the review queue redirects to a success screen detailing stats
Celebration popup renders badge details and XP animations matching the design

modules.name: AI Live Chat Tutor
modules.description: Design interactive chatbot chat rooms, loading logs, and sending messages over persistent WebSocket tunnels with text streaming output.

tasks.title: Implement AI Tutor Chat Workspace and History panel
tasks.description: Create route `/tutor/page.tsx`. Use the layout and visual structure in `front/stitch_assets/ai_tutor_panel.html`. Render a sidebar of past chat sessions (fetching `GET /api/tutor/sessions`) and a primary messaging thread displaying chat log histories (fetching `GET /api/tutor/sessions/{id}/messages`).
acceptance_criteria: Tutor workspace renders past sessions list and active thread layout correctly
Selecting a tutor session loads its respective conversation message logs
Clicking 'New Session' triggers session creation and initializes a blank thread

tasks.title: Integrate WebSocket for real-time AI Tutor chat streaming
tasks.description: Establish real-time WebSocket messaging connecting to `/ws/tutor/{session_id}`. Handle user message submission, append message bubbles instantly, and render incoming text chunk updates incrementally (streaming) into the AI message bubble. Handle automatic window scrolling.
acceptance_criteria: WebSocket connection is opened and authenticated with JWT upon session start
Submitting a message shows the user bubble immediately and streams the AI response smoothly
Auto-scroller maintains focus on the bottom of the dialogue stream during active transmission

modules.name: Navigation & Shell Routing Layout
modules.description: Hook up layout links, active page indicators, and ensure consistent routing paths across desktop and mobile screens.

tasks.title: Update App Shell Navigation Links to active routes
tasks.description: Update navigation links inside the app shell layout (`front/src/app/[locale]/(app)/layout.tsx`) for sidebar (desktop) and bottom bar (mobile) to point to the newly implemented routes: `/dashboard`, `/missions`, `/tutor`, `/vocabulary`, `/progress`, and `/settings` instead of the placeholder path `/dashboard`.
acceptance_criteria: All sidebar menu links and mobile bottom buttons route the browser to their corresponding subfolders
Active page indicators are visually accurate based on current pathname matches
